title: J&B Farm
description: A enjoyable addition to your farm
body:
![JBFARM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/078c1ec8f69aa2544a5205869aa1a298289089e6.png)

Tired of the usual farms? Want new mechanics on your farms? Then download J&B Farm

# Buffs

## Types of buffs and plants with these buffs:

### Moisture

Rice, Tea bush

### Disease Protection

Tomatoes, Onions

### Yield Improvement

Corn, Cucumbers

### Increased Experience Gain

Mint

There is also **Raspberry**, it does not give buffs to surrounding plants, but food from raspberries **gives very pleasant buffs.**

Buffs work in such an area:

![BuffRange](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dade0141ad1b4a928143517a83fc7de0f610cd1.png)

# Debuffs

In addition to the buffs, plants from the mod have debuffs, they can get sick, starting at alpha 0.2 the mod has diseases such as:

- **Jaundice** - looks like yellow pixels on the crop, it stops the growth and giving out crop buffs.

To cure any disease, hit the crop with a hoe and it will be cured.

### Q&A

A: **Where can i get plant seeds?**
> B: You can obtain random seeds by breaking grass, with a 10% chance of getting a seed.

A: **What will be added in the future?**
> B: New crops and buffs to them, new dishes and ways to cook them, achievements and possibly mobs.

A: **Will there be Forge support?**
> B: Probably yes

A: **Did I find a bug or have an idea where I can write about it?**
> B: You can write to my work e-mail **jbmodincorporated@gmail.com** or to me personally on telegram **@shepard993** (the probability that I will answer quickly is higher on telegram).
